meaning: Transfer Control Protocol,传输控制协议 /TCP/IP软件 /TCP/IP栈 /用于网络的一组通讯协议,包括IP(Internet Protocol)和TCP(Transmission Control Protocol) /TCP/IP衛 suite//TCP/IP协议栈
examples: He recruited some of the workers to start making spiral bulbs for TCP.
The dendrites of the TCP neurons usually make axodendritic synapses and dendrodendritic synapses with axonal terminals and presynaptic dendrites, respectively.
The internet sends information as discrete packets of data using a suite ofprotocols known as TCP/IP.
Known as TCP, the Transmission Control Protocol is core to the functioning of the the Internet.
Yet TCP is facing a new problem: technology used in energy-efficient light bulbs is changing.
